instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify that the commanded gear is successfully engaged.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall compare commanded gear with actual gear position after shift execution.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify gear engagement using gear ratio.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall validate gear ratio based on input and output shaft speed.

L4_requirements: IF Calculated_Gear_Ratio WITHIN Expected_Ratio_Range THEN Confirm_Gear_Engagement
IF Calculated_Gear_Ratio OUTSIDE Expected_Ratio_Range THEN Trigger_Ratio_Fault

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect incomplete gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect engagement failure when gear position sensor does not reach target.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect gear engagement timeout.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall trigger fault when gear engagement exceeds allowed time.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall monitor actuator response during gear engagement.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall verify actuator movement during shift execution.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall verify clutch engagement during gear change.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall validate clutch state during gear engagement.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable verification logic during system faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall suspend gear verification when system fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall record gear verification diagnostics.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall log diagnostic information during gear engagement verification.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect gear verification logic faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when gear verification algorithm fails.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Verification_Error = TRUE THEN Verification_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall periodically update verification logic parameters.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall refresh gear verification parameters at configured interval.
